ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, cryptocurrency) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the financial instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade for the financial instrument */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Price of the last trade for the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the period */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for the period */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the period */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the instrument during pre-market hours */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the instrument during after-market hours */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the market data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio instrument entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "percentage_profit_loss" REAL /* Percentage profit or loss of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the instrument's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "currency_conversion" TEXT /* Preferred currency conversion settings */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for notification types */,
  "portfolio_view_mode" TEXT /* Preferred view mode for portfolios */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_instruments" (
  "strategy_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy instrument entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "entry_rule" TEXT /* Rule for entering a trade with the instrument */,
  "exit_rule" TEXT /* Rule for exiting a trade with the instrument */,
  "entry_duration" TEXT /* Duration for the entry rule */,
  "exit_duration" TEXT /* Duration for the exit rule */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the instrument's strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_instruments_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "last_read" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
